name: Text Generate Effect
description: An animated text reveal effect where words appear one by one with a fade-in and blur animation, creating a typewriter-like generative feel.
whenToUse: Use for hero section headlines, AI-generated content displays, or any text that should appear with a word-by-word reveal animation.

props.name: words
props.description: The text string to animate word by word

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the text container

props.name: filter
props.description: Whether to apply blur filter during animation

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of each word's animation in seconds
